title: Leave Plans
description: Information on leave plan options offered by the employer.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the leave plan.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the leave plan.

description.title: Description
description.description: The description of the leave plan.

code.title: Code
code.description: A code that may be used to identify the leave plan.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of leave (e.g. sick, vacation, etc.).

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Type.

category.title: Category
category.description: The category associated with the leave plan.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Category.

accrualMethod.title: Accrual Method
accrualMethod.description: The method by which leave can be accumulated.

usage.title: Usage
usage.description: An indication whether the leave plan can be used before accrual or after accrual.

startOn.title: Start On
startOn.description: The start date of the leave plan.

endOn.title: End On
endOn.description: The end date of the leave plan.

planYearStart.title: Plan Year Start
planYearStart.description: The default start of the plan in a year.

month.title: Month
month.description: The month when the plan begins.

day.title: Day
day.description: The day when the plan begins.

alternateRolloverLeaveType.title: Alternate Rollover Leave Type
alternateRolloverLeaveType.description: The type of leave that can be rolled over from one plan to another at the end of plan year.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Alternate Rollover Leave Type.

accrualFrequency.title: Accrual Frequency
accrualFrequency.description: The frequency at which leave accrues.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Accrual Frequency.

waitDays.title: Wait Days
waitDays.description: The amount of time an employee must wait until he/she can take a leave.
